description_long: This coatrack features a simple, rustic design constructed from four sturdy, pointed wooden legs arranged in an A-frame configuration, connected by a horizontal wooden bar at the top. The wood appears to be wrapped or textured, giving it a rugged, hand-crafted look suitable for outdoor or utilitarian urban settings. Two orange hooks, possibly made of metal or painted wood, hang from the horizontal bar, providing space for coats or bags. The pointed ends of the legs suggest stability when placed on soft ground or uneven surfaces. There are no visible decorative elements, umbrella holders, or additional storage features. The overall appearance is functional and robust, ideal for use in parks, garages, or outdoor communal areas.
description: A rustic, freestanding wooden coatrack with four pointed legs and two orange hooks on a horizontal bar, designed for practical outdoor or utilitarian use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the coatrack, with both orange hooks clearly visible hanging from the horizontal bar.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the coatrack, with the legs forming an X-shape and the hooks barely visible.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, displaying the horizontal bar and both orange hooks, with the pointed legs visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the X-shaped leg arrangement and minimal visibility of the hooks.
